text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
……! 
A fire in such a narrow alleyway…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: An old, multi-tenant building in the alleyway. Smoke was billowing from a room on the fourth floor. Several people who looked like residents were looking up in concern.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, did you evacuate from there? Please try to stay calm. And… has everyone currently living there evacuated?

text_block_list.name: Frantic Woman
text_block_list.text: Um, the woman living in the second-floor apartment is still inside… I banged on her door and called out to her, but she won't listen to me…!

text_block_list.name: Worried Man
text_block_list.text: The old lady in that apartment has trust issues. She completely closed off her heart after being scammed a while back…

text_block_list.name: Worried Man
text_block_list.text: When I was a kid, she was a kind person who always played with me… Damn it… What do we do…!

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: …It's an old building. There's no telling when the fire will spread. We have to somehow get her to evacuate before she's in danger.
choice_data_list: <size=30>Don't tell me… you're going to try and persuade her…!?</size>
<size=30>Don't tell me… you're going to try and persuade her…!?</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: No matter who they are—There is no reason anyone should be left in danger!

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: (The hallway is dark… Probably because the fire started from the old electrical equipment… I have to hurry so we can calmly evacuate)

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
If the fire spreads, it will become dangerous here too. 
Please… I'm begging you to evacuate with me.

text_block_list.name: Despairing Woman
text_block_list.text:
Leave me alone! Everyone thinks I'm a nuisance anyway! 
You'd all be relieved no matter what happens to me!

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
…There is no one here like that. 
Everyone is worried about you.

text_block_list.name: Despairing Woman
text_block_list.text: Like I'd believe that. When I was in trouble, nobody helped me. I'm all alone in this world now!

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Just earlier downstairs, I met someone who said you used to play with him when he was a child.

text_block_list.name: Despairing Woman
text_block_list.text: Eh……?

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: If he thought you were a nuisance, why would he be so worried? If he didn't care about you, why would he remember the past?

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: —There are people who would be sad. Even if you think you are all alone, those connections are still alive.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Even if there are misunderstandings and disagreements, we can reconnect if we face each other. So—please. Come with me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After a brief exchange, she was able to persuade the female resident and bring her outside. The fire department arrived, and the fire was extinguished while it was still a minor blaze.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for causing you to worry. 
But—I'm just glad everyone is safe.

text_block_list.name: Worried Man
text_block_list.text: Granny! …I'm sorry. If I had just listened to you more when you were feeling down, I wouldn't have let you become so isolated.

text_block_list.name: Worried Man
text_block_list.text: From now on… let's talk more, just like we used to. I'm not the only one who remembers how much you took care of us back then.

text_block_list.name: Rescued Woman
text_block_list.text:
—Ah… I'm sorry for making you worry. 
You too… and you as well, little Horsegirl.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Hehe… I'm so glad… that you believed in the connections you had left.

text_block_list.name: Rescued Woman
text_block_list.text: ——……Are you crying…?

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
—Yes. 
Because I know that you're going to be okay now.

text_block_list.name: Rescued Woman
text_block_list.text:
…Haha. You're a strange child. 
But… thank you. You're a kind girl.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: You want to know my motives…?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In the end, there were no casualties. That being said, normally, one wouldn't go to such lengths just to bring a complete stranger outside.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Let alone a student who has no professional obligation or responsibility to do so. Despite that, she hadn't hesitated at all.
choice_data_list: <size=38>What on earth made you go that far?</size>
<size=38>What on earth made you go that far?</size>

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: …Let's see.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Because I want to connect things—perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Young Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Pisa, run with me this time!

text_block_list.name: Young Pisa
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Let's all do our best so we can go to Tracen Academy together!

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: My parents, the adults who supported me, the friends I ran with. Racing gave my younger self so many connections.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text:
—However, unreasonable events… 
can easily sever those connections.

text_block_list.name: Young Horsegirl
text_block_list.text: Pisa…! I'm scared, I'm so scared…!

text_block_list.name: Young Pisa
text_block_list.text:
The building is…! 
Where is everyone…!?

text_block_list.name: Pisa's Father
text_block_list.text:
It's dangerous here, we have to get away! 
Come on! Hurry!

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: There was a fire at the local junior training facility. Fortunately, there were no casualties, but—

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: —Many children became afraid of running and distanced themselves from racing altogether.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: —Even so.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: I am here right now.

text_block_list.name: Pisa's Father
text_block_list.text: …It's gotten pretty lonely around here since that fire. Things might never go back to how they used to be…

text_block_list.name: Young Pisa
text_block_list.text:
…Dad. If I don't stop running… 
do you think everyone will come back…?

text_block_list.name: Young Pisa
text_block_list.text: …I want to see everyone again. I want to smile and run together. So… I'll keep running.

text_block_list.name: Young Pisa
text_block_list.text: All the sadness, all the loneliness… If we all hold hands, I'm sure we can turn it into happiness!

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: —I… want to weave hope.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: Staying close. Connecting hearts. Erasing loneliness from this world. If I do that, I believe one day we can create a circle of hope that connects the entire world.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: These hands are—to take the hand of someone who is lonely. These legs are—to show hope by continuing to run.

text_block_list.name: Victoire Pisa
text_block_list.text: I don't know how much I can accomplish alone. Even so. Even the things I couldn't do back then… maybe someday.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Absolute selflessness. Her wish to "connect hearts with others and weave hope" was the very guiding principle of her life.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That connects not only to her daily life but also to what she wants to achieve through racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It makes sense why I couldn't see a clear-cut goal for her. It was simply too grand to be seen with a narrow perspective.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Touched by her endlessly pure and precious feelings, I felt a warmth spread deep within my chest.
